response.justification: Aisha has extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js skills, but her recent roles have been in AI-agent infrastructure and pricing automation rather than renewable energy or construction technology. Her background in geospatial platforms (GISCollective) and high-performance systems is relevant, but her seniority level (Staff/ Senior roles) may overshadow the entry-level requirement. Her AWS and Kubernetes experience are strong positives.
strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Strong background in scalable systems, databases (MongoDB, SQL), and cloud services (AWS, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated ability to work in diverse tech stacks and learn new tools quickly
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role (multiple Staff/Senior positions)
Limited direct experience in renewable energy or construction technology platforms
Recent work focuses more on AI-agent infrastructure than the core responsibilities of this role
